text: Best morning drip in Lancaster. I stop here on the way from Laurel Creek before Saturday classes.
Beautiful arrangements for my best friend's bridal weekend. Delivery to the venue was on time.
Owner helped me size shoes for a whole roster of little ballerinas. Went above and beyond.
Great post-shift brunch spot. Coffee refills come without asking and the eggs benedict is solid.
Took my dog in for a check-up. Staff was calm and thorough, prices are fair for downtown.
Booked a color and blowout for Priya's wedding weekend. Stylist listened and delivered.
Fast turnaround on recital programs. They matched the color proof exactly.
Alterations were fine but the pickup date slipped by two days. Would go back for basic hems.
